ip_outcome_note: Card name explicitly names Son Gohan. Vision shows dark-haired youth (no SSJ golden aura) with massive energy sphere forming above — precisely the visual signature of the Mystic/Ultimate form, where Gohan's hair stays dark while enormous latent power is released. Confirmed via CBR / Dragon Ball Wiki: the Ultimate form involves no visible transformation change, just massive ki release. Card title 'Newfound Power' directly references the power-awakening narrative of Old Kai's unlock ritual.

trivia_bullets.text: Gohan's Mystic (also called Ultimate or Potential Unleashed) form is not a Super Saiyan transformation — the hair remains dark and no aura color change signals the shift. The power was unlocked by Old Kai through a ritual lasting over 25 hours total (5+ hours of dancing, 20+ hours of meditation). At the time of its debut in Dragon Ball Z's Buu Saga, Ultimate Gohan's power exceeded Super Saiyan 3 Goku's. The 'Newfound Power' card title is a direct reference to this narrative. [CBR: Mystic Gohan Explained]

BT4-048 is an Uncommon Green Battle card from Colossal Warfare (2018). The card's artwork distinguishes Gohan's Ultimate state through dark hair and a large energy sphere — the in-universe visual cue for latent-potential release as opposed to a conventional Super Saiyan burst. [dbs-cardgame.com: BT4 cardlist]

Colossal Warfare (BT4, July 2018) drew primarily from the Dragon Ball Super Universe Survival Saga, but also incorporated classic Dragon Ball Z arc characters such as Gohan's Ultimate form, Grand Elder Guru, Nail, and Kami. This cross-era card pool was deliberate — the set's green cluster was explicitly themed around Namekians and Lord Slug Saga alongside the Piccolo fusion lineage. [dbs-cardgame.com: Series 4 Green Strategy Page]
